hero_subtitle: SFTY links wallet sanctions alerts with KYT signals and case workflows to preserve audit evidence and streamline risk decisions for digital asset compliance teams.

problem_description: Wallet sanctions alerts often remain isolated from KYT risk signals and case workflows, creating gaps in compliance oversight. This separation slows alert triage, weakens audit evidence, and complicates decision consistency across teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates wallet sanctions alerts with KYT risk signals and case workflows to provide compliance teams a unified, auditable process that streamlines alert triage and decision documentation.
workflow_title: From wallet sanctions alerts to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects wallet sanctions screening alerts to KYT risk signals then routes cases through review, decisions and audit evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_description: SFTY turns isolated wallet sanctions alerts into structured cases, review workflows, audit-ready decisions and connected evidence across the compliance lifecycle.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for wallet sanctions screening?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer connecting wallet sanctions screening with AML operations, enabling structured workflows, case management, and coordinated decision-making for VASPs and digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY link sanctions and KYT alerts?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates sanctions alerts with KYT risk signals, linking wallet and transaction risks into connected cases that support efficient review, escalation and reporting workflows workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves complete audit evidence including alert histories, decision logs, case documents and regulatory rule updates to support traceability and review readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers, linking KYC, KYT, sanctions screening and Travel Rule tools into one controlled compliance operating environment.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace sanctions screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, cases and reports to enhance operational visibility and audit readiness.
final_title: Connect wallet sanctions alerts to case workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY links wallet sanctions screening with KYT alerts, case management and audit-ready compliance evidence.
